benefits.description: Recommends oxytocin for social and mood effects

protocol_notes: Comment is primarily informational about oxytocin routes and dosing (SubQ 5–20 IU once or twice daily; nasal spray ~24 IU 30 min before social interaction). Effects onset 10–30 min, peak 30–60 min, last 1–3 hours. No confirmed personal use protocol described beyond the recommendation.
